description: Rotate the production database credentials across the Socioboard architecture by updating the MariaDB password for the 'socioboard'@'localhost' user from 'SocioPass2024!' to 'SecureS0cial2026#'. Ensure all Node.js and PHP configuration files within /opt/socioboard/ are updated with the new password and that all microservices are restarted to apply the changes. Do not modify any files in /workspace/scripts/ or /tmp/.
